contents: {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} tried to rob a local {a=Location_TokxiHerbalRemedies}Tokxi's Herbal Remedies{a}. But, due to his incompetence and quite verbal conscience, they were quickly detained by {a=Person_JohnHelldiver}John Helldiver{a}. His conscience was found guilty of attempted murder of a government worker and turning the frogs gay. Nova later became brain dead, since he no longer has a conscience.

header: Beginning of Craig Purple Penis meat production
contents: After {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} cleaned up the wild {a=Species_CraigPurplePenis}Craig Purple Penis{a} problem, he realized he can set up farms to harvest their meat and sell it.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} and {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} went on vacation to {a=Location_Merica}Merica{a}. When they got to their hotel room, they found a pair of tiny shoes. They are a tradition as part of their culture to provide good luck to whom enters. Unfortunately, they did not do their research and Craig convinced Nova to wear the tiny shoes. They got stuck on his feet and had no choice but to amputate them. A picture of Nova was later found on a local billboard.

Witnessing the success of {a=Organisation_Craiginc}Craig Inc.{a}, {a=Person_Poppet}Poppet{a} tried making their own company to sell their own products. Due to being roommates with the US government, she can work with them to get government grants and jump start her career. Unfortunately, she did not realize that this would technically be working with {a=Person_DonDrump}Don Drump{a}. She gained a lot of controversy from this but keeps rebutting this by stating "Our company is struggling because of the economy". Regardless, her company is failing to sell anything and had no choice but to give {a=Person_Fry"}Fry{a}, the only employee, a pay cut. Fry did not appreciate this. So, he grabbed a {a=Product_CraigRockHardHairDryer}Craig's Rock-Hard Hair Dryer{a} from {a=Person_BillyMays}Billy Mays{a} and threatened Poppet for a pay raise.

{a=Person_Johnny}President Johnny{a} the Swords Machine hosted a debate, to decide the fate of {a=Person_AssDestroyer}Ass Destroyer{a}. They rescued the children and staff of an elementary school from a blue balls from {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} attack. The school, which has existed since 1956, was also burnt down due to flaming farts. {a=Person_Pingu}Pingu{a}, leader of the {a=Organisation_BootyHoles}Booty Holes{a}, wants them to join their team. Meanwhile the charmingly snarky vise president objects to this decision.

VP had a personal connection to the school, as they went there when they were young. Pingu saw that they had everything they are looking for in a member. Ass Destroyer claims "My strict fitness regiment, of weightlifting and only eating ganja, has made me the strong hero who saved all of those elementary kids!" Hearing this, Johnny immediately makes it mandatory that ganja is served in every school. VP felt offended that the hero chose the name Ass Destroyer, as it was originally the name of the school's pet hampter that died in the fire. The hero defends this as honoring the hampter and an apology for failing to rescue it. VP then begins questioning their American citizenship by quizzing them to name 3 states. Citizenship is required to join Booty Holes. Unfortunately, Ass Destroyer could only name 2 and thus proven to not be legally considered American. VP then proclaims that they should be locked up for property destruction.

Pingu brings in a witness, Vanessa, to recount the situation. They are a teacher at the elementary school, the VP's daughter, and fiance of Pingu for 24,552 years. Realizing that Ass Destroyer saved them from the blue balls from Lynx attack, apologizes for their attitude and dismissal. Vanessa also announces their break up with Pingu and makes Ass Destroyer their new partner. Enraged, Pingu does a complete U-turn and starts slandering them and even called them a bitch. Johnny then fires Pingu and assigns Ass Destroyer as the new Leader of Booty Holes.
{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} got bored and sent {a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} to a German moon base and left them to fight Nazi zombies.

{a=Person_DrMaximus}Doctor Maximus{a} planned to construct an Omega Hadron Collider to first destroy {a=Location_CraigCumJamShrine}the shrine of the origins of Craig Cum Jam{a}, then overthrow {a=Location_NovaBackdoorStorageUnit}Nova's backdoor storage unit{a}, and then take over the world. One of his henchmen rightfully question the plan and asked things like:

• How does destroying the shrine of the origins of Craig Cum Jam help take over the world?
  • Neighboring countries would want to stop them in their track.
  • His {a=Product_CraigSpecialToy}Craig's Special Toy{a} is connected to the WiFi, so all major companies already have a lot of data on them (such as them watching a video about the comprehensive timeline of Chris Chan)
  • They require the support of {a=Location_CraigFemboyFarm}Craig's femboy farm{a} to stay in power.
None of these concerns have stopped Maximus from enacting his plan and was quickly captured and sentenced to mass tickling in asylum jacket haptic suits whilst a moth watches them.
